visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long dark hair and a blue beret stands in a Costco warehouse. She wears a white puffer vest over a blue top and holds a large green bag of snacks. Behind her are rows of shelving units stacked with similar pistachio snack bags. The lighting is bright and even. (2) The scene cuts to closer shots of the bag she is holding, emphasizing the Japanese packaging. Her facial expressions are animated and cheerful as she points to the price tag of 279 dollars displayed on the shelf. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor living room. The woman is now seated, holding the opened large bag. She reaches inside and pulls out a small, triangular individual packet. The background shows a wooden shelf filled with various plush toys and collectibles. (4) A close-up shot focuses on her hands as she opens the small packet and reveals a single green, coated nut. She holds it up to the camera to show its texture and size. (5) She puts the nut in her mouth and chews enthusiastically. Her eyes widen in a look of pleasant surprise. (6) She uses her fingers to break another nut apart, showing the interior pistachio. The video concludes with her gesturing excitedly towards the camera while holding the bag.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 不用在日本買了. [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (2) [Subtitle]: 現在他們有進這個. (3) [Subtitle]: 千成堂綠色酥脆開心果. (4) [Subtitle]: 279元小袋包裝. (5) [Subtitle]: 行李的空間又可以省一些. (6) [Subtitle]: 回去吃看看. (7) [Subtitle]: 這個好好吃哦. [Variety]: 超級香. (8) [Subtitle]: 我們剛剛打開來然後還來不及講評就已經吃掉一袋了. (9) [Subtitle]: 首先每個都單獨三角形的包裝. (10) [Subtitle]: 這那麼大對不對. (11) [Subtitle]: 可是它的那個面皮啊其實就薄薄的. (12) [Subtitle]: 它裡面是一顆大顆的開心果. (13) [Subtitle]: 然後外面是日本的那種米果子. (14) [Subtitle]: 米果子上面有一點細細的鹽. (15) [Subtitle]: 你先吃到細鹽然後酥脆的殼接下來是滿滿的開心果. (16) [Subtitle]: 還有它的殼呢非常的清脆. (17) [Subtitle]: 老人跟小朋友也可以輕鬆吃. (18) [Subtitle]: 你吃你聽. (19) [Subtitle]: 好好吃哦. (20) [Subtitle]: 米餅就這樣子是有空氣口感超好的. (21) [Subtitle]: 真的要買超喜歡的一下子整包就會不見了.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a dark blue beret with a kangaroo logo, a white sleeveless puffer vest, and a dark blue long-sleeved turtleneck.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The initial scene is a Costco warehouse with industrial shelving and bulk products. The second half is a domestic living room with a couch and shelves of toys.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A cheerful female voice introduces the product with high energy and a fast speech rate. The background music is an upbeat acoustic guitar track with a steady beat. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect coincides with a visual text reveal. The rustling of a plastic snack bag is clearly audible. (3) The voice continues in a conversational and friendly tone as she transitions scenes. The ambient noise floor lowers, suggesting a more controlled indoor environment. (4) Distinct, percussive 'crunch' sounds occur multiple times as the speaker bites into the snack. These sounds are bright and prominent. (5) The speaker's arousal level remains high as she expresses praise for the food, accompanied by subtle popping sound effects during text transitions.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The creator aims to inform viewers about a popular Japanese snack being available at Costco in Taiwan and to provide a positive taste test review to encourage purchase.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video appears to be a personal shopping vlog/review rather than a paid advertisement, though it features a specific product prominently.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-density subtitles and energetic editing characteristic of short-form social media food reviews.
